name: validator

metadata.notes: Validates input strictly according to the contract: first line contains two integers x and q (1 ≤ x, q ≤ 400000). Next q lines each contain either '1 a_i' with 0 ≤ a_i ≤ 10^9 or '2 K' with 1 ≤ K ≤ 10^9. No extra tokens are allowed. The validator does not enforce the output-related constraint that total K in YES queries does not exceed 4×10^5, as that is guaranteed by the problem and not part of input validity. All parsing errors or out-of-range values cause rejection.
